age_range.evidence: longitudinal study of 12 866 young people from age 13 years to 16 years in England.

countries.evidence: longitudinal study of 12 866 young people from age 13 years to 16 years in England.

fieldwork_year.evidence: In the first wave of LSYPE2, which commenced in 2013

sample_size.evidence: The exposure considered was the frequency of social media use ... at wave 1 (participants aged 13–14 years) through wave 3 of the study (participants aged 15–16 years). ... Wave 1 ... 9552 (74.2%) of the 12 866 total respondents
